query: MongoDB Atlas dedicated cluster pricing AWS storage per GB 2025
answer: MongoDB Atlas dedicated cluster pricing in 2025 is not publicly available; however, AWS storage per GB is approximately $0.024 in 2025. For the most current pricing, check the official MongoDB and AWS websites.

results.title: MongoDB Pricing
results.snippet: Choosing the right MongoDB Atlas cluster tier for your application involves considering the application's workload, data size, and performance needs. For Dedicated clusters, use Atlas Online Archive to tier infrequently accessed data, which will reduce primary storage costs. All App Services in an Atlas project share a monthly free tier: 1 million requests or 500 hours of compute, or 10,000 hours of sync runtime (whichever occurs first), plus 10 GB of data transfer. | Cluster Tier | Storage (GB) | RAM (GB) | vCPUs | Base Price |. | Cluster Tier | Storage (GB) | RAM (GB) | vCPUs | Base Price |. | Cluster Tier | Storage (GB) | RAM (GB) | vCPUs | Base Price |. | Cluster Tier | Storage (GB) | RAM | vCPUs | Base Price |. | Cluster Tier | Storage (GB) | RAM (GB) | vCPUs | Base Price |. | Cluster Tier | Storage (GB) | RAM (GB) | vCPUs | Base Price |.

results.title: MongoDB Atlas vs Amazon DocumentDB: Cost Considerations
results.snippet: Finally, the 300 GB of storage for Document DB is charged at $.30 per GB-month, corresponding to $90 ($.30 x 300 GB) in monthly storage costs
